title: BeBanking as Proprietary Managed Platform

title: Standard Scope — Single Entity Single Country

title: Managed Application — No Client Platform Access

title: Solution Consultant as Primary Delivery Contact

title: Phased Onboarding with Sequential Sign-Off

title: Supported Banking Partner List
